en: could do to this family. But if it's the only real choice we have, if it's either that or
ko: 이 가족에게 할 수 있는 일이지만,
ja: でもそれが唯一の選択なら、
zhTW: 但如果這是我們唯一的選擇，
vi: nhung neu do la lua chon duy nhat chung ta co,

en: you getting shot when you open your front door, you're not some hardened
ja: 玄関を開けた時に撃たれるか、どちらかなら。
zhTW: 如果不是這樣就是你開門時被槍殺。
vi: neu khong la anh bi ban khi mo cua truoc.

en: criminal, Walt. You are in over your head. That's what we tell them. That's the truth.
ko: 당신은 이미 깊은 수렁에 빠졌어. 그게 우리가 그들에게 말하는 거야.
ja: 手に負えなくなってるの。それを伝えるのよ。
zhTW: 你已經深陷其中了。這就是我們要告訴他們的。
vi: Anh da lun sau qua roi. Do la nhung gi chung ta noi voi ho.

en: No, it's not the truth. Of course it is. A schoolteacher, cancer,
ja: それが真実よ。いや、真実じゃない。
zhTW: 那就是事實。不，那不是事實。
vi: Do la su that. Khong, do khong phai su that.

en: desperate for money. Okay, we're done here.
zhTW: 學校老師，癌症，急需用錢。
vi: Giao vien, ung thu, can tien tuyet vong.

en: Roped into working for, unable to even quit. You told me that yourself, Walt. Jesus, what
ja: 働かされて、辞めることさえできない。
zhTW: 被迫替人工作，連辭職都不行。
vi: Bi keo vao lam viec, khong the nghi duoc.

en: was I thinking? Walt, please, let's both of us stop trying to justify this whole thing
ja: このすべてを正当化しようとするのはやめて
zhTW: 別再試圖為這一切辯護了
vi: hay ngung co bien minh cho moi chuyen

en: and admit you're in danger. Who are you talking to right now? Who is
ko: 당신이 위험에 처해 있다는 걸 인정하자.
zhTW: 你現在到底在跟誰說話？
vi: Bay gio anh dang noi chuyen voi ai?

en: it you think you see? Do you know how much I make a year? I mean, even if I told you,
ja: 俺が年間いくら稼いでるか知ってるか？
zhTW: 你知道我一年賺多少錢嗎？
vi: Em co biet anh kiem duoc bao nhieu mot nam khong?

en: you wouldn't believe it. Do you know what would happen if I suddenly decided to stop
ja: 言ったとしても、信じないだろう。
zhTW: 就算我告訴你，你也不會相信。
vi: Ngay ca neu anh noi, em cung se khong tin.

en: going into work? A business big enough that it could be listed on the NASDAQ goes belly
ko: NASDAQ에 상장될 수 있을 만큼 큰 사업이 사라져.
ja: NASDAQに上場できるほどの事業が消える。
zhTW: 一個大到可以在納斯達克上市的生意就沒了。
vi: Mot doanh nghiep lon du de niem yet tren NASDAQ se mat.
